english_text: I cannot tell you my wish
What did you get for your birthday?
This is the best birthday gift
So many birthday messages came in
I replied to all the messages
Koreans eat seaweed soup on birthdays
My mom made seaweed soup for me
Seaweed soup is a birthday tradition
It reminds mothers of giving birth
I always eat seaweed soup on my birthday
We went to a birthday dinner
In Korea the birthday person often treats
I had no idea about the surprise

korean_text: 한 살 더 먹고 더 지혜로워졌어
romanization: han sal deo meokgo deo jihyerowojyeosseo

english_text: I feel grateful for another year
korean_text: 한 해 더 살 수 있어서 감사해
romanization: han hae deo sal su isseoseo gamsahae

english_text: I set new goals for my new age
This year will be even better
I am glad you were born
You make the world a better place
May all your dreams come true
